ops.text: CLAUDE.md Models table routes implementation/review to gpt-5.6-sol via 'codex:codex-wrapper' (ships with codex plugin), but this session has no codex plugin loaded — Workflow agent() failed with "agent type 'codex:codex-wrapper' not found" and no Skill(codex) exists either. The sol lane is silently unreachable; fallback taken: opus xhigh. Cost: one dead workflow launch + rewrite. Either the codex plugin should be in this project's plugin set or the Models table needs an availability caveat.
